ns0:entry.ns0:title: Automattic/wordpress-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Automattic/wordpress-mcp
Language: php
WordPress MCP — This repository will be deprecated as stable releases of mcp-adapter become available. Please use https://github.com/WordPress/mcp-adapter for ongoing development and support.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DataDog/dd-trace-php
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-php
Language: php
Datadog PHP Clients

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DenverCoder1/github-readme-streak-stats
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DenverCoder1/github-readme-streak-stats
Language: php
🔥 Stay motivated and show off your contribution streak! 🌟 Display your total contributions, current streak, and longest streak on your GitHub profile README

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Dolibarr/dolibarr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Dolibarr/dolibarr
Language: php
Dolibarr ERP CRM is a modern software package to manage your company or foundation's activity (contacts, suppliers, invoices, orders, stocks, agenda, accounting, ...). it's an open source Web application (written in PHP) designed for businesses of any sizes, foundations and freelancers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: KhronosGroup/glTF-Sample-Assets
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/KhronosGroup/glTF-Sample-Assets
Language: php
An assortment of assets that demonstrate features and capabilities of the glTF format

Language: php
MISP (core software) - Open Source Threat Intelligence and Sharing Platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PrestaShop/PrestaShop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PrestaShop/PrestaShop
Language: php
PrestaShop is the universal open-source software platform to build your e-commerce solution.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WordPress/mcp-adapter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WordPress/mcp-adapter
Language: php
An MCP adapter that bridges the Abilities API to the Model Context Protocol, enabling MCP clients to discover and invoke WordPress plugin, theme, and core abilities programmatically.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bagisto/bagisto
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bagisto/bagisto
Language: php
Free and open source laravel eCommerce platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cedar2025/Xboard
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cedar2025/Xboard
Language: php
High-performance panel based on V2board secondary development supporting new protocols and new features

ns0:entry.ns0:title: coollabsio/coolify
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/coollabsio/coolify
Language: php
An open-source, self-hostable PaaS alternative to Vercel, Heroku & Netlify that lets you easily deploy static sites, databases, full-stack applications and 280+ one-click services on your own servers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: danielmiessler/SecLists
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/danielmiessler/SecLists
Language: php
SecLists is the security tester's companion. It's a collection of multiple types of lists used during security assessments, collected in one place. List types include usernames, passwords, URLs, sensitive data patterns, fuzzing payloads, web shells, and many more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: elementor/elementor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/elementor/elementor
Language: php
The most advanced frontend drag & drop page builder. Create high-end, pixel perfect websites at record speeds. Any theme, any page, any design.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ellite/Wallos
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ellite/Wallos
Language: php
Wallos: Open-source, self-hostable personal subscription tracker. Visualize your recurring expenses, manage your budget, and save money.

A powerful open-source UI framework for Laravel • Build and ship apps & admin panels fast with Livewire

URL: https://github.com/nextcloud/server

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pterodactyl/panel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pterodactyl/panel
Language: php
Pterodactyl® is a free, open-source game server management panel built with PHP, React, and Go. Designed with security in mind, Pterodactyl runs all game servers in isolated Docker containers while exposing a beautiful and intuitive UI to end users.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rajkumardusad/IP-Tracer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rajkumardusad/IP-Tracer
Language: php
Track any ip address with IP-Tracer. IP-Tracer is developed for Linux and Termux. you can retrieve any ip address information using IP-Tracer.
